question: Design a `Book` class with private members `title`, `author`, and `isbn` (all strings). Provide public methods to set and get these values, ensuring basic encapsulation.

test_cases.input: Set title 'The Great Gatsby', author 'F. Scott Fitzgerald', ISBN '978-0743273565'.
test_cases.expected:
Title: 
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
ISBN: 978-0743273565

errors: The `setTitle` method contains a logical error where it assigns the input `t` to the `isbn` member instead of `title`, resulting in the `title` remaining unset and the `isbn` being potentially overwritten.
